title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Spencer's Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
